# hetzner Provider

The Hetzner provider allows managing resources in the Hetzner Robot API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "hetzner" {
  # Credentials can be set here or via environment variables:
  #   HETZNER_ROBOT_USERNAME
  #   HETZNER_ROBOT_PASSWORD
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password for Hetzner Robot API. Can also be set via the `HETZNER_ROBOT_PASSWORD` environment variable.
- `username` (String, Sensitive) Username for Hetzner Robot API. Can also be set via the `HETZNER_ROBOT_USERNAME` environment variable.
